mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dorm_fee (dorm_fee_id, employee_id, room_id, target_year_month, amount, basis_area_sqm, basis_days, basis_detail, status, residence_history_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{dormFeeId}, #{employeeId}, #{roomId}, #{targetYearMonth}, #{amount}, #{basisAreaSqm}, #{basisDays}, #{basisDetail}::jsonb, #{status}, #{residenceHistoryId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT dorm_fee_id, employee_id, room_id, target_year_month, amount, basis_area_sqm, basis_days, basis_detail::text AS basis_detail, status, residence_history_id, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM dorm_fee WHERE dorm_fee_id = #{dormFeeId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE dorm_fee SET status = 'CONFIRMED', updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE dorm_fee_id = #{dormFeeId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'DRAFT'
